name: DELAY_f
description: Fixed delay SuperBlock - provides a fixed time delay using internal register and event delay
xmlExample: <BasicBlock id="..." parent="..." interfaceFunctionName="DELAY_f" blockType="h" dependsOnU="0" dependsOnT="0" simulationFunctionName="csuper" simulationFunctionType="DEFAULT" style="DELAY_f"><ScilabDouble as="exprs" height="0" width="0"/><ScilabDouble as="realParameters" height="0" width="0"/><ScilabDouble as="integerParameters" height="0" width="0"/><ScilabInteger as="nbZerosCrossing" height="1" width="1" intPrecision="sci_int32"><data line="0" column="0" value="0"/></ScilabInteger><ScilabInteger as="nmode" height="1" width="1" intPrecision="sci_int32"><data line="0" column="0" value="0"/></ScilabInteger><ScilabDouble as="state" height="0" width="0"/><ScilabDouble as="dState" height="0" width="0"/><mxGeometry as="geometry" x="0.0" y="-10.0" width="40.0" height="40.0"/><SuperBlockDiagram as="child" ...>...</SuperBlockDiagram></BasicBlock>
anomalies: No external event ports, used for continuous-like fixed delay
criticalRules: Internal structure must be preserved if modified
commonUses: Fixed time delay for continuous signals
